title: Star Wars Music Resource Pack
description:
This is a Star Wars Pack that changes all the music discs to be Star Wars music.
Music Credit:
John Williams, Kevin Kiner, Ludwig Göransson, Joseph Shirely
body:
This pack is made by the creators of the Youtube channels "The Blockbuster Bros" and "Foster's Creations". This Pack features all kinds off Star Wars music. We hope you like it!

Music:
 John Williams - The Final Saber Duel,
 John Williams - Imperial March,
 John Williams - The Force Theme,
 Ludwig Göransson - The Mandolorian,
 John Williams - Star Wars Main Theme,
 Joseph Shirely - The Final Showdown,
 John Williams - Duel of the Fates,
 John Williams - Across the Stars,
 Kevin Kiner - Star Wars Rebels Theme,
 John Williams - Battle of the Heroes,
 John Williams - Obi-Wan Kenobi Theme,
 John Williams - Cantina Band,
 Kevin Kiner - The Bad Batch Theme,
 John Williams - March of the Resistance,
 John Williams - Yoda's Theme,
 John Williams - The Finale,
 Ludwig Göransson - The Book of Boba Fett Theme,
 John Williams - Rey's Theme,
 John Williams - Leia's Theme,
 Mick Giacchino - The Skeleton Crew Theme,
 Kevin Kiner - Ashoka Tano,

In order for the discs to be the right length, get our data pack here:[https://modrinth.com/datapack/star-wars-music-data-pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/star-wars-music-data-pack)
